audit_items.proof_trace: The only heap allocation in rq.c (LDAP_CALLOC at L51) is guarded by `if (entry)` at L52. All `rq` parameters are always passed as `&slapd_rq` (address-of-global, never NULL). All `entry` parameters are verified non-NULL by callers: daemon.c guards `rtask` in a `while (rtask && ...)` loop, kinit.c checks `if (task)` after `_find`, and all other callers use entries from task function arguments where the scheduling loop guarantees non-NULL.
